commitMessage:
fix(mobile): lock body scroll and strengthen modal backdrop for homepage event cover modal

- Prevent background/viewport scrolling when modal is open (iOS + Android)
- Add capture-phase wheel/touchmove blockers and position:fixed body lock
- Set overlay overscrollBehavior:none, touchAction:none, overflow:hidden
- Increase backdrop opacity and z-index so bottom tabs/content never show through

Includes: prior AboutPageMobile and MasonryGallery modal scroll fixes.
